raw_cv_text:
Arvid Sandberg
+1 (415) 823-7641 | arvid.sandberg@gmail.com | https://github.com/arvidsan/quant-trading
EDUCATION
University of Waterloo | B.A.Sc. in Systems Design Engineering with specialization in September 2017 - May 2021
Financial Technology
Completed coursework in numerical methods, computational finance, and stochastic calculus; GPA 3.78/4.0 with Dean's
List recognition in 6 of 8 semesters.
EXPERIENCE
Citadel Securities | Quantitative Developer June 2022 - Present
Engineered real-time market microstructure analysis system processing 50M+ tick events daily, reducing latency from
2.3ms to 340μs through vectorized NumPy operations and Numba JIT compilation.
Developed Monte Carlo simulation framework for pricing exotic derivatives, achieving 15x speedup by implementing
GPU-accelerated matrix operations with CuPy across 1,024 parallel paths.
Optimized portfolio risk model by refactoring Cython modules and implementing adaptive grid refinement, cutting
computation time from 45 minutes to 3.2 minutes for daily VaR calculations across 10,000+ positions.
Jane Street | Quantitative Developer (Mid-Level) August 2021 - May 2022
Built statistical arbitrage backtesting engine in OCaml with 18-month historical dataset, identifying 22 new profitable
strategies with Sharpe ratios exceeding 1.8 across four asset classes.
Debugged and optimized core price discovery algorithm, resolving race conditions in multiprocessing pipeline that
improved tick-to-order fill consistency by 12% under high-volume market conditions.
Collaborated with traders to validate 6 machine learning models for regime detection, implementing feature engineering
pipeline that improved model accuracy from 68% to 81% on out-of-sample data.
Numerai (Quantitative Research Division) | Junior Quantitative Developer January 2021 - July 2021
Constructed ensemble meta-model combining 40+ individual predictors using LightGBM stacking, achieving 15th
percentile ranking on Numerai tournament with monthly payout of $2,400 USD.
Implemented automated data validation pipeline detecting missing values and outliers in 2.1M+ historical stock features,
reducing downstream model training failures by 34%.
Accelerated correlation matrix computations from 22 seconds to 1.8 seconds by migrating from pandas to polars and
vectorizing covariance calculations for 8,000-stock universe.
PROJECTS
Reinforcement Learning Market Maker | Python, TensorFlow, Ray, PostgreSQL October 2023 - March 2024
Developed DQN-based market making agent using historical LOB data from 3 years of E-mini S&P 500 futures,
achieving net P&L of $47,300 in live paper trading on 50-contract portfolio.
Engineered feature extraction pipeline normalizing 18 microstructure indicators (spread, depth skew, order flow
imbalance) across multiple asset classes with 99.2% data integrity validation.
High-Frequency Volatility Surface Interpolator | C++, Eigen, HDF5, SciPy May 2023 - August 2023
Constructed radial basis function (RBF) interpolation system for 2D equity option volatility surface supporting 12,000+
data points, reducing pricing errors to 1.3 basis points vs. 28bp with linear methods.
Optimized sparse matrix operations reducing memory footprint from 2.8GB to 340MB, enabling real-time surface
recalibration every 2 seconds across 50+ underlyings.
Cross-Exchange Statistical Arbitrage Framework | Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Redis January 2023 - April 2023
Built low-latency cointegration detection engine monitoring price deviations across 8 cryptocurrency exchanges,
identifying 14 profitable pairs with average holding period of 8 minutes and 62% win rate.
Implemented vector autoregression model with rolling Kalman filter to dynamically adjust hedge ratios, improving P&L
consistency and reducing maximum drawdown from 18% to 9.2%.
EXTRACURRICULAR
Global Association of Risk Professionals (GARP) | FRM Charterholder March 2023 - Present
Completed Financial Risk Manager certification covering market, credit, and operational risk; scored in 88th percentile on
Part II exam.
Mentoring 3 junior developers through FRM study materials, focusing on quantitative risk concepts and practical
applications in derivatives pricing.
QuantConnect Community | Algorithm Author & Technical Reviewer September 2022 - Present
Published 5 open-source trading algorithms achieving average 1,200+ views and 156 GitHub stars across community, with
3 algorithms featured in QuantConnect Academy tutorials.
Reviewed 28+ peer submissions improving code quality, backtesting methodology, and documentation standards across
C#, Python, and F# implementations.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – English (fluent), Swedish (native), German (intermediate)
Technologies – Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy), C++, Cython, OCaml, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Numba, SQL (PostgreSQL,
ClickHouse), Redis
Tools – Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Jupyter, CMake, gdb, perf, Bloomberg Terminal, FactSet, Refinitiv
